prompt: A photorealistic aerial view of a group of people standing in a field. Each person has visible strings connecting them to others. One person in the center has many strings radiating outward to many people, while most other people have only one or two strings. The strings glow faintly. Shot from directly above, cinematic lighting, no text, no labels.
visual_logic: A central figure connected to all surrounding people by glowing strings, while each outer person has only one connection — visually embodying how your friends always have more friends than you do.
